overall.description: Gameplay footage from Grand Theft Auto V showing first-person driving from a yellow vehicle through an urban environment. The player waits at a traffic light, accelerates through an intersection while a pedestrian crosses, cruises down a multi-lane street, and stops at the next intersection to wait for cross traffic.

agents.ego_description: stopped at red traffic light behind a black sports car, waiting for the signal to change

notable_agents.action: black sports car stopped at the red light directly ahead

entered.detail: single-story beige commercial building with green awnings and multiple storefronts
large advertising billboard mounted on poles above the commercial building
row of tall palm trees lining the sidewalk behind a concrete wall
beige concrete wall with neatly trimmed hedge on top separating sidewalk from road
traffic signal suspended on horizontal pole over the intersection showing red

segments.scene_description: The vehicle is stopped at a red light at an urban intersection. A beige commercial strip with green awnings occupies the left side while palm trees line the right sidewalk behind a concrete retaining wall. A black sports car waits ahead at the traffic light.

events.description: traffic light turns green and vehicle accelerates forward from a stop
pedestrian runs across the road from left to right in front of the vehicle

agents.ego_description: accelerating through the intersection while navigating around a pedestrian crossing the road

notable_agents.action: woman in dark clothing running across the road from left to right
black sports car accelerating ahead through the intersection

entered.detail: tall buildings and city structures visible on the horizon down the road

segments.scene_description: The vehicle accelerates through the intersection as the light turns green. A pedestrian crosses from left to right in front of the car. The commercial buildings recede behind while the palm trees pass by on the right, and distant city buildings become visible ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: multi-lane city street with tree-lined median

agents.ego_description: cruising down the multi-lane road at steady speed following the black sports car ahead

entered.detail: traffic signal at the upcoming intersection showing red
green and yellow gas station canopy visible on the left side of the road

segments.scene_description: The vehicle travels down a wide multi-lane city street lined with trees. The palm trees recede into the distance on the right while a gas station appears on the left. The car approaches a second traffic light in the distance.

events.description: vehicle slows to a complete stop at the red traffic light
multiple vehicles pass through the intersection from left to right

agents.ego_description: stopped at the red light waiting for cross traffic to clear before proceeding

notable_agents.action: black sedan driving through the intersection from left to right
white delivery truck with orange and yellow branding turning left through the intersection

entered.detail: multi-story residential apartment building visible past the intersection

segments.scene_description: The vehicle stops at a red light at the next intersection. Cross traffic including a black sedan and a white delivery truck passes from left to right. An apartment building is visible on the left beyond the intersection while the traffic light hangs directly ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person perspective from a yellow vehicle as it navigates a sunny urban corridor between two traffic intersections. It begins stationary at a red light, facing a black sports car with beige commercial buildings and green awnings to the left and palm trees behind a concrete wall to the right. As the light turns green, the vehicle accelerates through the intersection, passing a pedestrian crossing the street while the commercial strip recedes and distant city skyscrapers emerge on the horizon. The scene then opens into a wide multi-lane street where the palm trees drift backward and a gas station appears on the left before the camera approaches another signal. Finally, the vehicle comes to a halt at a second red light, watching a black sedan and a white delivery truck pass in cross traffic with an apartment building visible in the distance.
